steps.title: Introduce the obligation
steps.content: The sentence says NATO's collective defense principle gives Spain both benefits and obligations. The following words explain those obligations: other members must defend Spain, and Spain must defend them in return.

steps.title: Choose the explanatory mark
steps.content: A and B leave the reverse is also true improperly attached by a comma to another independent clause. C places a comma before the explanatory while clause, making the sentence structure awkward and incomplete. A colon correctly introduces the explanation of the obligations. The answer is D.
